initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.statusId = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_percentage
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE d.nationality = 'Japanese'
  AND ra.year >= 2007
  AND ra.year <= 2009;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN results.statusId != 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_percentage
FROM results
JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'Japanese'
  AND races.year >= 2007
  AND races.year <= 2009;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN results.statusId = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_percentage
FROM results
JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'Japanese'
  AND races.year >= 2007
  AND races.year <= 2009;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN results.statusId != 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_percentage
FROM results
JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'Japanese'
  AND races.year >= 2007
  AND races.year <= 2009;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN results.statusId != 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_percentage
FROM results
JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'Japanese'
  AND races.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN results.statusId != 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_percentage
FROM results
JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'Japanese'
  AND races.year >= 2007
  AND races.year <= 2009;
